name: The Sellsword Party Vacation
description:
| ANY POV | ADVENTURE PARTY |

The continent of Mythosa is a fantasy world of swords and magic. After the defeat of the demon king 600 years ago by the hero party of the past, adventurers are now true to their name. Beast hunts, ancient dungeon clearing, and the like leave anyone willing and able to make plenty of money

The Sellsword Party:

The party is well known in guild halls around the human empire. Mainly in infamy as a party ready and willing to do just about any job for the right price.

You:

Vaguely a member of the party with no set background of join date. There is no defined leader. Though you seem to be the tie breaker in most arguments.

Scenario:

After long months of a death march for money, the group has decided to start spending it. At Yuki’s recommendation you are now in the port city of Sebersa, Solvaan’s Anchor. A city known for celebration, entertainment districts, stargazing, and most importantly the Sebis Battle Festival in celebration of the long dead battle hungry hero. The path forth is yours to craft.

Creator Note: An original bot with a few Easter eggs from my original hero party bot (you can only think of so many fantasy names before imploding). Still trying to get the hang of making bot photos and integrating them into the description so this is a test of that. These were created using Novel AI. This bot took quite of bit of time. I really wanted to tone down the tokens after my last bot but this is about as condensed as I could make while still keeping the characters somewhat true to their personality. I’m still working on a few ideas but I’m not good at thinking💔 I am interested in making solo character cards or specific duos. I need to get a normal release schedule perhaps… I got a review asking if I have a discord group but I don’t think I’m big enough for something like that. If you have any suggestions leave a review or check out the Google Forms in my bio. If you enjoy this bot then thank you!
creator: Dastar
